description: NIAC Action is the 501(c)(4) lobbying arm of the [National Iranian American Council (NIAC)](/orgs/niac), created in June 2015 to engage in direct political lobbying during the push for the [JCPOA nuclear deal](/events/jcpoa-nuclear-deal-2015). Led by [Jamal Abdi](/people/jamal-abdi), it conducts grassroots advocacy, maintains local chapters, and engages political candidates on Iran-related policy. Its creation formalized lobbying activities that NIAC had already been conducting through its 501(c)(3) — activities that were the subject of the Hassan Dai lawsuit controversy.
editorial_notes: Sister organization to NIAC. Created to explicitly lobby for JCPOA.
